properties.name: Chickpet Cross
properties.description: The junction of Doddapet and Chikkapet is said to be the heart of Bangalore Pete that was founded by Kempe Gowda in 1537 AD

properties.name: Big White Silk Tree
properties.description: It seems that the identification of this remarkable tree is controversial: the signs indicate ‘Ceiba pentandra,’ but some believe it to be ‘Bombax ceiba.’

properties.name: War Tank
properties.note: Tank captured during war with Pakistan
